summary_one_line: Reach false side of cmsIsMatrixShaper: a v4+ perceptual/saturation profile whose color-space/class is NOT an RGB matrix-shaper.

hypotheses.what_input_feature: An ICC profile header whose version field (offset 0x08) and color-space signature (offset 0x10-0x16) are mutated away from the seed-corpus 'RGB' matrix-shaper layout to a non-matrix-shaper profile (e.g. version 05 with 'MCH3' or 'Luv ' color space) so cmsIsMatrixShaper returns FALSE while the v4+/perceptual gate at line 214-215 still passes.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: cmplog winner seeds carry version byte 05 at offset 0x08 and non-RGB color-space signatures 'MCH3' and 'Luv ' at offsets 0x10-0x16, so the profile is not a matrix shaper and execution falls through to the false branch (lines 222-226).
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: All naive loser seeds keep the original 'RGB' signature (52 47 42) at offsets 0x10-0x12 and version 04 at 0x08, which is recognized as a matrix shaper, so cmsIsMatrixShaper returns TRUE and execution takes the true branch at line 219.
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: cmplog's I2SRandReplace reads the post-execution CmpLogObserver buffer of the signature/version comparisons inside cmsIsMatrixShaper and substitutes the other operand at the matching input offsets, flipping 'RGB'/version-04 to a non-matrix-shaper value in a single substitution; the dash-row I2S-floor signal in the winner's ancestor chain confirms an I2S find contributed to this lineage.

hypotheses.what_input_feature: Same program-side condition (non-matrix-shaper v4+ perceptual/saturation profile), reached by mutating the color-space signature bytes at offsets 0x10-0x16 away from 'RGB' (e.g. 'REB'/'RG4') so the multi-byte signature comparison inside cmsIsMatrixShaper resolves to a non-matrix-shaper class.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: value_profile winner seed carries 'RG4' (52 47 34) at offsets 0x10-0x12 — a one-byte deviation from 'RGB' — which is no longer a matrix-shaper signature, so the false branch is taken.
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: naive loser seeds are pinned to 'RGB' at offsets 0x10-0x12 with no closer-matching CMP feedback to guide them off the matrix-shaper signature, so they remain on the true branch.
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: value_profile's CMP_MAP records the matching-prefix/Hamming-distance bucket of the signature comparisons inside cmsIsMatrixShaper; an input whose signature bytes are progressively closer to a non-matrix-shaper class adds a new CMP_MAP bucket and is retained, giving a gradient that climbs to the non-RGB signature naive cannot discover by blind havoc.

hypotheses.what_input_feature: Same program-side condition (non-matrix-shaper v4+ perceptual/saturation profile); the distinguishing input feature is a profile that drives cmsIsMatrixShaper to FALSE, with the false-side basic-block edge becoming new coverage when indexed by the deep call context (cmsDetectBlackPoint reached via ComputeConversion/DefaultICCintents).
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: naive_ctx winner seed (the naive_ctx-stored false-branch seed) carries non-RGB signature bytes ('REB' at offsets 0x10-0x12) and reaches the blocker; the false-branch edge is recorded at a context-specific map slot, so a partial advance toward the non-matrix-shaper class registers as new coverage and is preserved.
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: naive records the cmsIsMatrixShaper edge in a single context-agnostic map slot, so once the matrix-shaper true branch (line 219) is covered it gets no new-coverage credit for inputs edging toward the false side, and stays blocked on the 'RGB' true-branch profile.
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: naive_ctx's CtxHook folds the caller chain into the edge-map index, so the (call-context, edge) pair for the false side of cmsIsMatrixShaper is a distinct coverage bucket; this finer granularity rewards intermediate inputs that naive discards, letting the campaign retain and extend toward the non-matrix-shaper profile.

evidence_trail.claim: The blocked side of the branch is the false branch of cmsIsMatrixShaper at cmssamp.c:218.
Taking the true branch calls BlackPointAsDarkerColorant and is the loser-only path; the false branch falls through to lines 222-226 which is winner-only.
cmplog beats naive at this branch, attributed to the I2S technique.
cmplog winner seeds carry version byte 05 and non-RGB color-space signatures 'MCH3' and 'Luv '.
naive loser seeds keep the 'RGB' signature and version 04.
At the signature offsets the winner bytes vary across many color spaces while loser bytes are locked to 'RGB'.
The version byte at offset 0x08 differs: winners include 05 while losers are all 04.
cmplog's I2SRandReplace scans the input for one CMP operand and substitutes the other at matching offsets.
evidence_trail.exact_quote:
scans the input for byte sequences matching one
operand, and substitutes the other operand at those offsets

evidence_trail.claim: value_profile beats naive at this branch, attributed to the value_profile technique.
value_profile winner seed carries 'RG4' at the signature offsets, a one-byte deviation from 'RGB'.
value_profile's CMP_MAP encodes operand closeness so an input closer to matching adds a new bucket and is preserved.
evidence_trail.exact_quote:
An input that produces a
CMP-operand pair closer to matching than any previously-seen pair
adds a new CMP_MAP bucket and is preserved as corpus.

evidence_trail.claim: naive_ctx beats naive at this branch, attributed to the ctx_coverage technique.
naive_ctx's CtxHook folds the call context into the edge-map index so the same edge is a distinct bucket per call path.
evidence_trail.exact_quote:
folds it into the edge-map index, so the same basic-block edge is
recorded at different map slots depending on the call path that
reached it.

evidence_trail.claim: naive_ctx stored a winner-resolving false-branch seed carrying a non-RGB 'REB' signature.
The false side of cmsIsMatrixShaper is reached through a deep call chain via ComputeConversion and DefaultICCintents.

mechanism_consistency_check.verification_method: Ran `python3 tools/db_query.py lineage --branch 2342 --role W --fuzzer cmplog --trial 1 --seed 263ed7bab1e89086`; the chain reported an I2S-floor dash row (mutation_op = -) at depth 9 (ancestor 5441efb6193a1a03), the lower-bound signal of an unwrapped I2SRandReplace find in the cmplog winner's ancestry.

falsifiability.would_be_refuted_by: A synthetic harness where cmsIsMatrixShaper's color-space/version comparison operands are derived at runtime (not byte-mapped from the input) so I2SRandReplace has no input pre-image to substitute, yet cmplog still resolves the false branch significantly faster than naive — that would show the win is not from I2S byte substitution of the signature field.

weakest_evidence_point: The exact program logic distinguishing a 'matrix-shaper' from a non-matrix-shaper profile is inferred from the byte-diff of the color-space signature and version fields rather than read directly from cmsIsMatrixShaper source, which is not shown in the prompt.
